layers.description: Root-level build configuration, CI/CD pipelines, deployment config, and tooling metadata. These files define how the project is built, tested, and deployed but contain no application logic.
layers.name: Configuration & Infrastructure

layers.description: Markdown documentation files, analysis reports, and developer tooling output. Provides project context, onboarding guidance, and code quality reports.
layers.name: Documentation & Analysis Artifacts

layers.description: Shared TypeScript type definitions that form the project's vocabulary. Defines every entity, stat, equipment piece, damage type, and build state that the rest of the codebase references. This is the most imported layer.
layers.name: Foundation Types

layers.description: Pure numeric and string constants that parameterize every game mechanic. Organized into a barrel-re-exported constants directory. Zero logicâ€”just named values that the engine and data layers consume as tuning parameters.
layers.name: Game Constants

layers.description: Static game entity data (JSON) and TypeScript modules that define game mechanics as structured data. Contains weapon stats, armor sets, enchantments, perks, buff/debuff definitions, weapon arts, and all other game content. This layer has two sub-layers: raw JSON data and logic-bearing TypeScript data modules.
layers.name: Game Data Definitions

layers.description: Core damage calculation pipeline that transforms a BuildState into a complete BuildResult. Handles weapon stat resolution, enchantment application, perk post-processing, CDR calculation, crit computation, defense reduction, buff assembly, and damage type resolution. The central brain of the calculator.
layers.name: Calculation Engine

layers.description: Svelte writable and derived stores that manage the application's build configuration state. Handles localStorage persistence, debounced saving, and exposes convenience functions for modifying build state (setting enchantments, swapping slots, clearing).
layers.name: State Management & Persistence

layers.description: Reusable, framework-agnostic UI building blocks that define the visual design system. Includes Badge, Button, Card, Divider, Panel, Section, and Stat components, plus the global CSS design tokens.
layers.name: UI Primitives (Design System)

layers.description: Domain-specific Svelte components that compose UI primitives with application logic. Includes search/filter systems, modal dialogs, stat displays, buff rendering, tooltip generation, and interactive controls.
layers.name: Feature UI Components

layers.description: Top-level components that wire together the entire application. The root App.svelte manages all top-level state, modal systems, and child component orchestration. DamageAnalyzer.svelte and BaseDamageCalc.svelte contain the main analysis views with complex reactive computation chains.
layers.name: Application Orchestration

layers.description: Offline utilities that duplicate engine logic for debugging and validation. Independent of the Svelte frontend.
layers.name: Standalone Debug Tools

nodes.name: mountRunes.ts
nodes.summary: Defines mount rune data structures (MountRuneDef, MountRuneM1Def, MountRuneWADef) and a lookup array of three mount rune configurations (Winter Woof, Slizard, Glacial Snapper) with M1 basic attack and Weapon Art definitions including damage types, scalings, and secondary effects.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting interface definitions and a constant array of mount rune configurations with factory functions for damage values.

nodes.name: procCoefficients.ts
nodes.summary: Lookup tables for proc coefficients across all weapon types, weapon arts, runes, and perks. Provides M1/M2 proc coefficients per weapon type, weapon art proc coefficients, rune proc coefficients, perk-on-hit proc coefficients, and default fallback values for missing entries.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with four exported Record-type lookup tables and two default constant values for proc coefficient resolution.

nodes.name: statboost.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the stat-boost perk system with a registry of 16 perk handlers (Roaring Heads, Lucky, Quick Witted, Whirl Foot, Carapace, Extra Layers, Frozen Heart, Immovable, Righted Wrongs, Rocky Body, Spellshield, Strong Tides, Swift Guard, True Balance, Brawny, Weight Distribution) that modify character stats based on existing stat values and perk amounts. Executes perks in a defined order and rounds final stat values.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with a PERK_REGISTRY mapping perk names to handler functions, helper utility functions for stat manipulation, and an exported applyStatBoostPerks entry point.

nodes.name: weapon base dmg.ts
nodes.summary: Defines base damage values for all 30 weapon types in the game, specifying M1 (basic attack) and M2 (heavy attack) hit patterns using the WeaponHit type. Some weapons include m1Finisher flags and m2Charge mechanics (e.g., Rifle with charge formula).
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting a single WEAPON_BASE_DMG constant array. Uses the WeaponBaseDmg type from lib/types.ts. Notable filename contains a space.

nodes.name: stat-conversions.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 23 named numeric constants defining conversion rates, multipliers, and subtraction values used by the stat-boost perk handlers. Covers Weight Distribution, Quick Witted, Whirl Foot, Carapace, Extra Layers, Frozen Heart, Immovable, Righted Wrongs, Rocky Body, Spellshield, Strong Tides, Swift Guard, True Balance, Brawny, and subtraction constants for Roaring Heads and Lucky perks.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting only numeric constants. No functions or classes. Pure configuration data consumed by statboost.ts.

nodes.name: dmgTypes.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the core damage computation type system: BADGE_CONFIG for UI badge display (14 perk badges with colors/labels), ComputedType (per-damage-type computation result with scaling, crit, proc, and healing fields), PerkOnHitDmg (perk-on-hit damage definition), and ComputedHit (complete hit computation result grouping multiple ComputedTypes).
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting one constant record (BADGE_CONFIG) and three interface/type definitions. Imports ProcCoefficient from lib/types.ts.

nodes.name: character.ts
nodes.summary: Data access layer for character entities. Loads races, guilds, and perks from JSON data files, builds lookup maps by name, and exports accessor functions (getRace, getGuild, getPerk, getGuildRank) plus a Monk guild check utility. Provides the runtime data layer for character/race/guild/perk selection.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module importing JSON data files and re-exporting typed arrays and lookup functions. Depends on lib/types.ts for Race, Guild, GuildRank, Perk types.

nodes.name: equipment.ts
nodes.summary: Data access layer for equipment entities (armor, rings, runes, enchantments). Loads from JSON data files, builds lookup maps, and exports typed arrays and accessor functions (getEnchant, getRing, getRune, getArmorPart, getArmorSlotTypes, armorSupportsSlot). Includes armor normalization logic merging shared parts with individual part overrides.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module importing four JSON data files with complex armor normalization. Depends on lib/types.ts for Armor, ArmorPart, Ring, Rune, Enchantment types.

nodes.name: weapons.ts
nodes.summary: Data access layer for weapon component entities (blades, handles, gloves, essences). Loads from JSON data files, builds name-keyed lookup maps, and exports typed arrays and accessor functions (getBlade, getHandle, getGlove, getEssence) for runtime weapon data resolution.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module importing four JSON data files and exporting typed arrays with simple name-based lookup functions. Depends on lib/types.ts for WeaponBlade, WeaponHandle, MonkGlove, MonkEssence types.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Central type definition file for the entire project. Defines all core types and interfaces: stat system (StatKey, StatMap, PERCENT_STATS, STAT_KEYS), character entities (Race, Guild, GuildRank, Perk), equipment (Armor, ArmorPart, Ring, Rune, Enchantment), weapon components (WeaponBlade, WeaponHandle, MonkGlove, MonkEssence), build state (BuildState), damage types (WeaponHit, WeaponBaseDmg, ProcCoefficient, BoostEntry), and utility functions (applyUpgrade, getProcCoeffValue, canProc). Re-exports DMG_TYPE_COLORS and DMG_TYPE_PRIORITY.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module defining the project's shared type system. Contains 20+ interface/type definitions, 2 utility functions, and multiple constant exports. Most other modules in the project depend on this file.

nodes.name: getMountRuneDef
nodes.summary: Looks up a mount rune definition by its rune name from the MOUNT_RUNE_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: applyStatBoostPerks
nodes.summary: Main entry point for the stat-boost perk system. Takes a stat map and a perk nameâ†’amount record, applies all registered perk handlers in execution order, then rounds final percent stats. Returns a new stat map without mutating the input.

nodes.name: getRace
nodes.summary: Looks up a Race definition by name from the RACE_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getGuild
nodes.summary: Looks up a Guild definition by name from the GUILD_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getPerk
nodes.summary: Looks up a Perk definition by name from the PERK_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getGuildRank
nodes.summary: Retrieves a specific GuildRank from a Guild object by iterating its ranks array and matching the rank number.

nodes.name: isMonkGuild
nodes.summary: Checks if the given guild name is 'Monk' to identify the monk guild class.

nodes.name: getEnchant
nodes.summary: Looks up an Enchantment definition by name from the ENCHANT_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getRing
nodes.summary: Looks up a Ring definition by name from the RING_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getRune
nodes.summary: Looks up a Rune definition by name from the RUNE_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getArmorPart
nodes.summary: Retrieves a specific ArmorPart from an armor definition by name and part type (Helmet, Chestplate, or Leggings).

nodes.name: getArmorSlotTypes
nodes.summary: Returns a Set of ArmorPart types supported by the named armor piece.

nodes.name: armorSupportsSlot
nodes.summary: Checks whether a named armor piece supports a given slot type by delegating to getArmorSlotTypes.

nodes.name: getBlade
nodes.summary: Looks up a WeaponBlade definition by name from the BLADE_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getHandle
nodes.summary: Looks up a WeaponHandle definition by name from the HANDLE_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getGlove
nodes.summary: Looks up a MonkGlove definition by name from the GLOVE_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: getEssence
nodes.summary: Looks up a MonkEssence definition by name from the ESSENCE_MAP lookup table.

nodes.name: applyUpgrade
nodes.summary: Applies an upgrade level multiplier to a stat map: positive stats are multiplied by (1 + level Ã— 0.1), negative stats are divided by the same factor. Returns a new stat map.

nodes.name: getProcCoeffValue
nodes.summary: Extracts the numeric proc coefficient value from a ProcCoefficient union type, returning 0 for noProc, the coefficient value for hasCoeff, or 1 for undefined.

nodes.name: canProc
nodes.summary: Checks whether a ProcCoefficient allows proccing by delegating to getProcCoeffValue and checking if the result is greater than 0.

nodes.label: Boost.ts
nodes.summary: Defines all damage/heal boost definitions for the Voxel Blade damage calculator. Exports BOOST_DEFS (33+ boost entries), BoostContext interface, BoostDef interface, and helper functions calcMinionAbsorptionPotency and calcFrenzyPct. Each boost specifies a sourceName, type (dmg/heal), optional multiplierPerPerk, optional calcFn for complex conditional logic, optional attack-type applicability, and proc coefficient requirements.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses TypeScript interfaces for BoostContext and BoostDef. Boost definitions use a mix of simple multiplierPerPerk and complex calcFn closures. Imports numeric constants from lib/constants and types from lib/types.

nodes.label: debuffCombatEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines combat effects for each debuff type in Voxel Blade. DEBUFF_COMBAT_EFFECTS maps debuff names (Weakness, Shatter, Sticky variants, Electrical Rend, Despair, Frostbite, Hypnotized) to DebuffCombatEffect objects containing description generators, damage multipliers, defense reductions, and elemental damage type multipliers.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses as const for ALL_DEF_STAT_KEYS tuple type. Each debuff entry may include descFn, damageMult, defReduction, and/or typeDamageMult callbacks. Imports constants from debuff-effects.ts and perks.ts.

nodes.label: enemyHpEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines HP-gated effects that trigger on enemies based on their health percentage. Currently contains Mycotic Bloom (slows above 50% HP, boosts poison DOT below 50% HP). Exports interfaces EnemyHpGate, EnemyHpDebuffEffect, EnemyHpDotBoost, EnemyHpEffectDef, and functions isEnemyHpGateActive, getActiveEnemyHpDebuffs, and getEnemyHpDotMultiplier.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses TypeScript discriminated-style optional fields (debuff vs dotBoost) in EnemyHpEffectDef. No imports in this file.

nodes.label: perkAutoDebuffs.ts
nodes.summary: Core auto-debuff logic that determines which debuffs are automatically applied to enemies based on player perks and combat state. getAutoDebuffs checks ~15 different perks (Exhaust, Penance, Melting Shred, Fungal Prototype, Venom Spitter, Toxin Caster, Gorecast, Bellowing Ember, Frostbite, Gelid Lance, Weakening, Sunburn, Fiery Pursuit, Hypnotist, and enemy HP effects) and returns GrantedBuff entries. Also exports calcActualHpFillPct for protection-adjusted HP calculation.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of conditional debuff application with guard checks. Imports from Boost.ts, constants/perks.ts, BuffData.ts, types.ts, constants/game.ts, and enemyHpEffects.ts. Uses canProc helper for proc coefficient gating.

nodes.label: debuff-effects.ts
nodes.summary: Small constants module defining numeric values for debuff combat formulas: Weakness formula constant, defense conversion factor (100), Sticky damage multiplier (1.2), and Despair display/damage coefficients (display divisor 0.1, display mult 8.5, damage coeff 0.085, damage divisor 0.1).
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constants file with no imports. All values are numeric literals.

nodes.label: game.ts
nodes.summary: Core game constants module providing single source of truth for game parameters. Defines level cap (80), HP formula (BASE_HP=120, HP_PER_LEVEL=0.0125), calcBaseMaxHP function, and UI timing constants (save debounce, undo window, search blur delay, import display, focus delay, toast duration).
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constants and one utility function. No imports. HP formula: round(120 * (1 + level * 0.0125)).

nodes.label: perks.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive perk-related constants module with 50 exports. Covers generic perk scaling (Luminescent, Spirit Winds, Dark Magic, etc.), crit damage formulas (BASE_CRIT_DAMAGE=150, various per-perk crit modifiers), Mortal Will holy stacking, Sunburn damage/chance values, Fiery Pursuit damage/duration, and Hypnotist potency/duration/magic armor constants.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constants file. Uses as const for WILD_BOLT_ELEMENTS tuple. Imports only DEFAULT_LEVEL and DEFAULT_HP_FILL from game.ts (though these are not used in current file content).

nodes.label: storage.ts
nodes.summary: LocalStorage persistence configuration. Defines storage keys for build state, defenses, level, HP fill, and saves. Exports BUILD_STATE_DEFAULTS (complete default build configuration), SAVE_KEY_MAP/UNMAP (short key mapping for URL serialization), ENCH_MAP/UNMAP (enchantment key mapping), MAX_BUILD_SLOTS (5), and CONFIRM_TIMEOUT_MS (3000).
nodes.languageNotes: Imports DEFAULT_LEVEL and DEFAULT_HP_FILL from game.ts. BUILD_STATE_DEFAULTS is a Record<string, any> with ~30 default fields. SAVE_KEY_MAP provides short aliases for URL serialization.

nodes.label: dmgTypeBonuses.ts
nodes.summary: Engine module that computes elemental/typed damage bonuses from perks. PERK_DMG_TYPE_BONUS_DEFS defines 4 typed perks (Void Rageâ†’hex, Channeled Weaponâ†’magic, Emotionalâ†’fire, Draconic Bloodâ†’dynamic based on draconic color). buildDmgTypeBonuses iterates these definitions, evaluates conditions, and builds a Record<string, number> bonus map keyed by damage type.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses TypeScript conditional/optional fields in PerkDmgTypeBonusDef. Imports constants from perks.ts and getEffectiveDraconicInfusionPotency from draconicBuffs.ts. Supports dynamic type resolution via getType callback.

nodes.title: Weaponartcheck.ts
nodes.summary: Weapon art eligibility checker that validates whether a weapon art can be equipped given a character's scalings, stats, weapon type, and guild affiliation. Provides both boolean validation and detailed unmet-requirement messages.

nodes.title: checkWA
nodes.summary: Main exported function that determines whether a weapon art is usable by a given build. Checks guild, part names, at-least-one-scaling, scaling thresholds, stat requirements, and weapon type in sequence, returning false on the first failure.

nodes.title: getUnmetReqs
nodes.summary: Companion to checkWA that returns an array of human-readable requirement descriptions for every condition the current build fails to meet for a given weapon art.

nodes.title: weaponArts.ts
nodes.summary: Central data registry of all weapon arts in Voxel Blade. Defines the WAIndividualHit, WeaponArtRequirement, and WeaponArt interfaces, then exports a WEAPON_ARTS array containing 48 weapon art definitions with their damage formulas, cooldowns, hit structures, extras, and equip requirements.

nodes.title: WEAPON_ARTS
nodes.summary: Array of 48 weapon art objects covering all elemental schools (Physical, Magic, Fire, Water, Earth, Air, Hex, Holy), Monk skills, healing/support, and utility. Each entry specifies base damage, damage type, scaling, cooldown, hit breakdown, and requirements. Notable entries include Starstream (7-element multi-hit) and conditional Monk arts.

nodes.title: _utils.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal math utility module exporting round2 and round4 for floating-point rounding to 2 and 4 decimal places respectively, using the Epsilon-compensated technique.

nodes.title: round2
nodes.summary: Rounds a number to 2 decimal places with Epsilon compensation to avoid IEEE 754 rounding artifacts.

nodes.title: round4
nodes.summary: Rounds a number to 4 decimal places with Epsilon compensation to avoid IEEE 754 rounding artifacts.

nodes.title: build.ts
nodes.summary: Central build calculation orchestrator. The calcBuild entry point accumulates stats and perks from all equipment slots (armor, ring, rune, weapon, infusions), finalizes perks through effectiveness/cursed/potency processing, then derives CDR, damage boosts, crit, and buff states. This is the main pipeline that converts a BuildState into a complete BuildResult.

nodes.title: calcBuild
nodes.summary: Public entry point that takes a BuildState and returns a full BuildResult. Calls accumulateEquipment â†’ finalizePerks â†’ deriveResults pipeline.

nodes.title: accumulateEquipment
nodes.summary: Collects all stats and perks from race, guild, armor slots (helmet/chestplate/leggings with enchantments and upgrades), ring, rune, weapon (blade+handle or monk glove+essence), and infusion slots. Returns raw aggregated stats and perk maps.

nodes.title: finalizePerks
nodes.summary: Post-processes the raw perk map: filters zero values, applies Perk Effectiveness and Cursed multipliers, merges Bucklerâ†’Parry, and distributes Grantor perk values into corresponding Potency perks (Bleed/Burn/Poison).

nodes.title: calcCDR
nodes.summary: Calculates cooldown reduction for both rune and weapon-art pools from CDR perks, rune filters, emotional state, race modifiers, and toggleable perks. Returns CDRResult with per-source breakdowns.

nodes.title: calcBoosts
nodes.summary: Computes all damage multipliers from level scaling, perks, boost definitions, race effects, and contextual state (HP fill, darkness, mount, rage, burn, debuffs). Returns a BoostResult with entries and final multiplier.

nodes.title: deriveResults
nodes.summary: Derives the final BuildResult from raw stats and finalized perks. Applies stat boosts, emotional attack speed, gladiatorial rage, CDR calculation, crit, buff assembly, protection-based HP adjustment, weapon art damage type detection, and boost calculation.

nodes.title: data.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module that aggregates character data, equipment data, and weapon data from sub-modules into a single import point for the engine layer.

nodes.title: enchant.ts
nodes.summary: Enchantment application and management module. Handles two-phase stat modifier application (selector-based transforms then direct modifiers), perk effectiveness scaling with Cursed/PerkEffectiveness stacks, infusion stat halving, and enchant slot exclusivity enforcement.

nodes.title: applyEnchantmentsToSlot
nodes.summary: Core enchantment pipeline for a single equipment slot. Phase 1 applies selector-based stat modifiers (Restored, Flawless positive/negative/defense transforms). Phase 2 applies direct stat modifiers (Quenched, Strengthened, etc.), perk multiplier/enchant effects. Returns final stats and perk map after upgrade is applied.

nodes.title: applyPerkEffectiveness
nodes.summary: Scales all non-exempt perks by (1 + PE*0.1) * (1 + Cursed*0.1). Exempts enchant effects, Cursed, Luminescent Fervor, Valor, Spirit Commune, and potency perks.

nodes.title: applyInfusion
nodes.summary: Halves all stats from an infused item and passes perks through unchanged. Used for equipment infusion slots.

nodes.title: enforceEnchantSlot
nodes.summary: Enforces exclusivity rules for enchantment slots: removes duplicates when a new enchant is selected, and if an exclusive enchant is present, clears all other slots.

nodes.title: format.ts
nodes.summary: Display formatting utilities for stats. formatStat produces signed values with optional % suffix, and formatLabel converts camelCase keys to Title Case.

nodes.title: formatStat
nodes.summary: Formats a stat value for display: rounds to 2 decimal places, strips trailing zeros, and adds a sign prefix. Appends % for percentage-type stats.

nodes.title: formatLabel
nodes.summary: Converts a camelCase stat key to a human-readable Title Case label by inserting spaces before uppercase letters and capitalizing the first character.

nodes.title: shrine.ts
nodes.summary: Shrine bonus system. Defines tier-based stat multipliers (1: 3.0x â†’ 5: 1.0x) and applies them to both scaling values and equipment stats.

nodes.title: SHRINE_MULTIPLIERS
nodes.summary: Record mapping shrine tier (1-5) to stat multiplier: tier 1 = 3.0x, tier 2 = 1.7x, tier 3 = 1.4x, tier 4 = 1.1x, tier 5 = 1.0x (no bonus).

nodes.title: applyShrineToStats
nodes.summary: Multiplies all non-null stats in a StatMap by the shrine tier multiplier and rounds each to 2 decimal places. Returns a new object.

nodes.title: applyShrineToScalings
nodes.summary: Multiplies all scaling values by the shrine tier multiplier. Returns early with a copy if the multiplier is 1.0 (tier 5).

nodes.title: weapon.ts
nodes.summary: Weapon calculation engine. Resolves weapon type from blade+handle combination, detects hybrid builds (different element scalings on each part for 1.5x bonus), merges scalings and stats with shrine support, and handles both standard and Monk weapon paths. The 37-field WeaponResult interface captures the full weapon state.

nodes.title: calcWeapon
nodes.summary: Public API for standard (non-Monk) weapon calculation. Takes blade and handle names plus shrine flag, looks them up, and returns a full WeaponResult or null.

nodes.title: calcMonkWeapon
nodes.summary: Public API for Monk weapon calculation. Takes glove and essence names, applies monk rank stat bonuses (0.25x per rank above 1) and perk bonuses, and returns a full WeaponResult or null.

nodes.title: WeaponResult
nodes.summary: Comprehensive weapon state with 37 fields covering: part names/types, damage types, raw/final scalings and stats per part, merged scalings, weapon type resolution, hybrid detection, shrine state, attack speed, and perks.

nodes.title: BuffData.ts
nodes.summary: Central buff/debuff data module defining all buff definitions, granted-buff factories for perks/runes/weapon-arts/cantrips/races, and the buff assembly pipeline that computes modified potency and duration from active perks.
nodes.languageNotes: Large TypeScript module with ~20 exported functions and 2 exported constants. Uses record literals extensively for static data. Heavy reliance on TypeScript interfaces for type safety.

nodes.title: TypedDmgBoost.ts
nodes.summary: Calculates per-damage-type damage and heal multipliers from active perks and buffs. Supports conditional activation (e.g., Photosynthesis only in sunlight) and buff-potency-driven or perk-amount-driven scaling.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with a single exported calculation function and supporting types. Uses function callbacks in definition objects for flexible multiplier logic.

nodes.title: buffs.ts
nodes.summary: Pure constants module exporting ~120 numeric constants for buff/debuff potency values, durations, rune stat values, weapon-art buffs, True Balance coefficients, perk-buff factory parameters, buff potency modifiers, and generic debuff modifiers.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure TypeScript constants file with no logic. All exports are numeric literals organized into categorized sections with comments.

nodes.title: damage-types.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the complete damage type taxonomy for the game: 11 damage types with metadata (label, color), defense inheritance maps, type priority ordering, and curated type arrays for different calculation contexts.
nodes.languageNotes: Small TypeScript constants module. Uses Object.fromEntries for derived data and readonly tuples for type lists.

nodes.title: damageTypeResolve.ts
nodes.summary: Utility functions for resolving and transforming damage type distributions: merging base types with bonuses, Fire-Air bidirectional conversion, weapon-art damage type resolution (including 'same as weapon' and 'highest type' modes), and Air-to-Magic conversion with optional Dark Magic hex.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with 5 exported pure functions. Uses regex for parsing weapon art damage type strings. Immutable object spread patterns throughout.

nodes.title: BuffDefinition
nodes.summary: Defines the shape of a buff/debuff entry in the BUFF_DEFS registry: name, color, description, effect scaling, stat binding, and category flags (isDebuff, isSelfDebuff, isNeutral, potencyCapped).

nodes.title: GrantedBuff
nodes.summary: Represents a buff instance granted by a specific source, carrying buffName, potency, duration, trigger condition, source attribution, and optional flags for self-debuff and burn mode.

nodes.title: TypedDmgBoostCtx
nodes.summary: Context object for typed damage boost calculations: perks map, active buffs, sunlight status, and draconic color.

nodes.title: TypedDmgBoostEntry
nodes.summary: Result entry for an active typed damage boost: perk name, label, affected types, damage multiplier, heal multiplier, activation condition, and optional group applicability.

nodes.title: TypedDmgBoostResult
nodes.summary: Aggregated result of typed damage boost calculations: per-type damage multiplier map, combined heal multiplier, and list of active boost entries.

nodes.title: BuffPotencyModifier
nodes.summary: Defines a modifier that adjusts a specific buff's potency and duration based on perk stacks. Supports optional rune-source filtering and custom duration multiplier formulas.

nodes.title: GenericDebuffModifier
nodes.summary: Defines a generic modifier that applies to all debuffs based on perk stacks: potency multiplier, flat potency bonus, and duration multiplier per stack.

nodes.title: ActiveBuffsBuildInput
nodes.summary: Input shape for the assembleActiveBuffs pipeline: all equipment slots (rune, ring, infusionRing, helmet, chestplate, leggings, weaponBlade, weaponHandle, monkGlove), optional race, and selected weapon art.

nodes.title: BUFF_DEFS
nodes.summary: Master registry of all buff and debuff definitions (~30 entries). Each entry defines name, color, description, effectPerTenthPotency, effectUnit, optional statKey, and category flags. Some include dynamicDescription functions for context-aware rendering.

nodes.title: ITEM_BUFF_MAP
nodes.summary: Array of GrantedBuff entries granted by specific items/runes (Rage Rune, Toad Slam Rune, Bounce Rune, Beenade Rune, Ancient Cleric Rune, Boostshroom, Sporeling Toss, Thunderous Charge, Winter Woof, Glacial Snapper, Cacitrops, Brainblast, Hex Web, Fireball).

nodes.title: BASIC_DEBUFF_POOL
nodes.summary: Shared pool of 6 basic debuffs (Bleed, Burn, Poison, Shatter, Slowness, Weakness) with standardized potency and duration. Used by Cursed Bark, Cursed Ground, Dark Elf race, and Wild Bolt.

nodes.title: PERK_BUFFS
nodes.summary: Record mapping ~30 perk names to factory functions (PerkBuffFactory) that produce GrantedBuff arrays based on perk amount and all active perks.

nodes.title: WEAPON_ART_BUFF_MAP
nodes.summary: Record mapping weapon art names to their granted buff arrays: Warrior Stomp, Javelin, Lightning Cloak, Cursed Ground.

nodes.title: TRUE_BALANCE_DEBUFF_MAP
nodes.summary: Mapping from debuff names to their True Balance buff conversions: DoTs â†’ Regen, slows â†’ Tailwind, armor-rend â†’ Reinforce, Weakness â†’ Rage, Despair â†’ Inspired. Each has potency and duration functions of perk amount.

nodes.title: BUFF_POTENCY_MODIFIERS
nodes.summary: Array of 10 BuffPotencyModifier entries that adjust specific buffs' potency and duration based on perk stacks: Bounce Momentum, Gladiatorial Rage, Mage Rage, Oceans Rage, Slayer Rage, Iron Slayer Spirit, Fury, Tailwind, Wind Walker, Slow Leak.

nodes.title: GENERIC_DEBUFF_MODIFIERS
nodes.summary: Array of 2 GenericDebuffModifier entries that apply globally to all debuffs: Endless Despair (potency multiplier + flat bonus + duration) and Stored Corruption (duration only).

nodes.title: RACE_BUFF_MAP
nodes.summary: Race-specific buff grants: BUNIKIN gets Critical Boost on dodge, DARK ELF gets random debuffs on hit.

nodes.title: TYPED_DMG_BOOST_DEFS
nodes.summary: Array of 4 typed damage boost definitions: Glyph Conduit (magic), Rage (physical+conditional), Photosynthesis (holy+earth in sunlight), Converted Energy (all types from Hex Shield).

nodes.title: DMG_TYPE_META
nodes.summary: Metadata for all 11 damage types: display label and hex color for Physical, Magic, Fire, Water, Earth, Air, Hex, Holy, True, Summon, Heal.

nodes.title: DMG_TYPE_PRIORITY
nodes.summary: Priority ordering for resolving ties in 'highest damage type' selection: hex > water > air > true > earth > magic > fire > physical > holy.

nodes.title: ALL_DMG_TYPES
nodes.summary: Complete list of all 10 damage types used in boost calculations: physical, magic, fire, water, earth, air, hex, holy, true, summon.

nodes.title: DEF_INHERITANCE
nodes.summary: Maps element types to their defense inheritance: air/earth inherit from physical; fire/water/hex/holy inherit from magic.

nodes.title: applyBuffPerkModifiers
nodes.summary: Core buff modifier pipeline. For each buff, computes specific-modifier bonus, Bastion Bless bonus, Trickster reflection, generic debuff modifiers, Contained multiplier, and Dark One duration. Returns new buffs with adjusted potency and duration.

nodes.title: assembleActiveBuffs
nodes.summary: Complete buff assembly pipeline: collects item buffs + perk buffs + weapon-art buffs, applies perk modifiers, converts Tailwindâ†’Whirlwind, and applies Cauterize burn mode conversion.

nodes.title: getPerkBuffs
nodes.summary: Iterates all perks, calls each perk's factory function with its amount and the full perk map, and collects all resulting GrantedBuff entries.

nodes.title: getActiveBuildBuffs
nodes.summary: Collects buffs from all equipped items/runes by looking up each slot in BUFFS_BY_ITEM_SOURCE, plus race-specific buffs.

nodes.title: getWeaponArtBuffs
nodes.summary: Looks up a weapon art name in WEAPON_ART_BUFF_MAP and returns its buff array (or empty).

nodes.title: getTrueBalanceBuffs
nodes.summary: Converts active enemy debuffs into beneficial buffs via True Balance perk. Groups debuffs by their converted buff type, takes the highest potency/duration per group.

nodes.title: getSpecificBuffModifiers
nodes.summary: Computes per-buff potency bonus and duration multiplier from buff-specific modifier entries (BuffPotencyModifier). Respects rune filters, self-debuff exclusion, and Contained exception.

nodes.title: getBastionBlessBonus
nodes.summary: Computes the Bastion Bless potency bonus for non-debuff, non-neutral, non-self-debuff, non-potency-capped buffs.

nodes.title: getGenericDebuffModifiers
nodes.summary: Computes global debuff modifiers from Endless Despair and Stored Corruption: potency multiplier, flat bonus, and duration multiplier.

nodes.title: getTricksterReflection
nodes.summary: Computes the Trickster reflection bonus for self-applied Despair debuffs, adjusting for Warding debuff multiplier.

nodes.title: applyToxinTransferDuration
nodes.summary: Adjusts Toxin Transfer poison duration to match the player's self-poison duration plus a fixed bonus.

nodes.title: convertTailwindToWhirlwind
nodes.summary: When Whirlwind perk is active, renames all Tailwind buffs to Whirlwind with scaled duration, and adds a Bleed application on WA/Rune use.

nodes.title: getBuffDescription
nodes.summary: Renders a human-readable buff description string, handling dynamicDescription, special cases for Weakness/Shatter/Anti Heal, and generic x% template substitution.

nodes.title: calcBuffEffect
nodes.summary: Computes the display effect value for a buff at a given potency: value = effectPerTenthPotency Ã— potency Ã— 10, plus a formatted label.

nodes.title: applyCauterizeConversion
nodes.summary: When Cauterize is active (and Cursed Flames is not), marks all enemy Burn buffs with burnMode: 'singed' for burst-on-application instead of DoT.

nodes.title: getBurnApplicationCount
nodes.summary: Counts the number of Burn entries in a buff list, used to scale Cauterize/Singed burst damage.

nodes.title: calcTypedDmgBoosts
nodes.summary: Main calculation function: iterates TYPED_DMG_BOOST_DEFS, evaluates each boost's driving value, computes per-type damage multiplies and heal multiplies, and returns the aggregated TypedDmgBoostResult.

nodes.title: getMaxBuffPotency
nodes.summary: Helper: finds the maximum potency among active buffs matching a given buff name.

nodes.title: resolveDamageTypes
nodes.summary: Merges base damage type values with bonus values additively. Returns baseTypes unchanged if bonuses is empty.

nodes.title: applyFireAirConversion
nodes.summary: Converts 50% of Fireâ†”Air damage bidirectionally (Echo Incineration mechanic). No-op if both are zero.

nodes.title: resolveWaDamageTypeKeys
nodes.summary: Resolves weapon art damage type string into a damage type record. Supports 'Same as weapon', 'Highest damage type' (with priority tiebreak), and explicit format like '200 Physical 100 Magic'.

nodes.title: getFinalWaDmgTypes
nodes.summary: Combines resolveWaDamageTypeKeys and resolveDamageTypes to produce the final weapon art damage type distribution with bonuses applied.

nodes.title: applyAirToMagicConversion
nodes.summary: Multi-step conversion pipeline: Airâ†’Magic (Spirit Winds) at given rate, then optional Fireâ†”Air (Echo Incineration), then optional Dark Magic hex bonus on native magic only.

nodes.title: DoTDamage.ts
nodes.summary: Damage-over-Time (DoT) calculation engine providing tick damage formulas, potency scaling, Caustic Slow computation, and builder-to-game value conversion for Bleed, Burn, and Poison debuffs.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module using `as const` tuple pattern for DotType union, `Record<>` for lookup maps, and `ReadonlyArray` for the type list.

nodes.title: Perkbasedmg.ts
nodes.summary: Central perk damage definition registry. Defines interfaces (PerkDmgCtx, HpGate, SecondaryEffect, PerkDmgDef), HP-gate activation logic, and the PERK_DMG_DEFS array containing 30+ perk damage definitions with base damage formulas, damage types, scaling modes, hit counts, proc coefficients, secondary effects, and activation conditions.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with extensive interface definitions, exported constant arrays of typed object literals, conditional function callbacks, and a large PERK_DMG_DEFS array serving as a declarative damage registry.

nodes.title: draconicColorEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Draconic color (element) attack stat definitions. Maps six draconic colors (fire, air, earth, water, holy, hex) to their associated damage multipliers, speed modifiers, stun effects, and special passive abilities via the DRACONIC_COLOR_ATTACK_STATS array.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module using interface for typed stat objects and a Map-based lookup pattern for O(1) access by color name.

nodes.title: raceEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Race-conditional effect definitions and utility functions. Implements the Human below-50%-HP passive (damage boost + DR) and the Ork Tenacity system that calculates bonus damage based on the count of active non-debuff, non-neutral buffs.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with generic type parameters (T extends ...) for buff filtering, using HpGate from Perkbasedmg and isHpGateActive for threshold checks.

nodes.title: dot-damage.ts
nodes.summary: Pure constants module for Damage-over-Time formulas. Exports 14 numeric constants defining base damage, scaling values, potency limits, rounding precision, and builder-to-game conversion factors used by the DoT calculation engine.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting only `const` numeric literals. No functions or classes. Serves as a centralized tuning spreadsheet for all DoT formulas.

nodes.title: getDotBase
nodes.summary: Computes the flat base damage of a DoT tick before potency multiplier. Formula: DOT_BASE_DAMAGE Ã— (1 + inflictionPotency / DOT_INFLICTION_DIVISOR).

nodes.title: getDotPotencyMult
nodes.summary: Computes the potency multiplier for a DoT tick. Formula: (1 + dotPotency)^(1 + min(DOT_POTENCY_POWER_CAP, dotPotency)). Exponent caps at 2 when dotPotency â‰¥ 1.0.

nodes.title: calcDotTick
nodes.summary: Computes a single DoT tick damage value by combining base damage (getDotBase) with potency multiplier (getDotPotencyMult) and rounding to DOT_ROUND_FACTOR precision.

nodes.title: calcCausticSlow
nodes.summary: Computes Caustic Slow tick damage. Converts builder-display Poison Potency to game value, applies the base DoT formula, then multiplies by a slow-duration bonus (1 + slowDuration Ã— DOT_SLOW_MULT_PER_SECOND).

nodes.title: toGamePotency
nodes.summary: Converts a builder-display perk value to the game-internal value by multiplying by DOT_BUILDER_TO_GAME (0.1).

nodes.title: calcDotDisplayPotency
nodes.summary: Computes the effective DoT display potency for a debuff, applying the Endless Despair (ED) modifier when the player has the perk. ED scales potency by (1 + 0.35 Ã— edAmt) + 0.1.

nodes.title: gateThreshold
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective HP threshold from an HpGate. Returns undefined (always active) if the perk amount meets the alwaysActiveAtPerkAmount, otherwise delegates to getThreshold or returns the static hpThreshold.

nodes.title: isHpGateActive
nodes.summary: Determines whether an HpGate is currently active given the player's HP fill percentage and perk amount. Returns true if no gate or always-active; otherwise checks above/below threshold.

nodes.title: calcSpringblastBaseDamage
nodes.summary: Computes the total Springblast base damage given a perk amount. Formula: (SPRINGBLAST_BASE_HIT + SPRINGBLAST_PER_STACK_HIT Ã— perkAmount) Ã— (1 + SPRINGBLAST_MULT_PER_STACK Ã— perkAmount).

nodes.title: PERK_DMG_DEFS
nodes.summary: Declarative array of 30+ PerkDmgDef objects defining every perk's damage behavior: base damage formula, damage types, stat scalings, hit counts, proc coefficients, secondary effects (DR, heals, debuffs), HP gates, and activation conditions. Covers Springblast, Basic/Buni/Mageling/Toadzerker/Dire Buni/Void Root/Bomber Spirit, Bounce Momentum, Bomber Charge, Protector Spirit, Air Pressure/Barrier, Apollo Boost, Dragon Claw/Bubble, Roaring Heads, Barbed Flurry, Honey Arts, Sickness, Melting Slime, Whirlwind, Dragon State, Volatile Shell, Spore Burst, Royal Finisher, Grounded Despair, Echo Incineration, Bombardier, Venom Spitter, Cauterize, Steam Charge, Quarry, Wind Drill, and Fiery Pursuit.

nodes.title: getDraconicColorDmgMultiplier
nodes.summary: Returns the damage multiplier for a given draconic color from the DRACONIC_COLOR_MAP. Defaults to 1 if the color is not found.

nodes.title: DRACONIC_COLOR_ATTACK_STATS
nodes.summary: Array of 6 DraconicColorAttackStats objects defining the stat bonuses for each draconic color: fire (speed + burn), air (speed + knockback + cooldown), earth (damage + stun + speed), water (damage + speed + stun + heal/cleanse), holy (heal), hex (stun + weakness + random debuffs).

nodes.title: getActiveRaceEffect
nodes.summary: Finds and returns the active RaceConditionalEffect for a given race name and HP fill percentage, using isHpGateActive to check threshold conditions.

nodes.title: getOrkTenacityBuffs
nodes.summary: Filters a buff list to return only those buffs that count toward Ork Tenacity: non-debuff, non-self-debuff, and non-neutral buffs. Uses buff definition metadata for classification.

nodes.title: calcOrkTenacityBonus
nodes.summary: Calculates the Ork Tenacity bonus as 0.1 per qualifying buff. Uses getOrkTenacityBuffs to count active buffs, then multiplies by ORK_TENACITY_PER_BUFF.

nodes.title: DOT_BASE_DAMAGE
nodes.summary: Base damage constant for DoT ticks (1.75).

nodes.title: DOT_BUILDER_TO_GAME
nodes.summary: Conversion factor from builder-display potency to game-internal potency (0.1). Builder value 5 â†’ game value 0.5.

nodes.label: weaponConditionalBoosts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines weapon-conditional damage boosts tied to specific perks (e.g., 'Aggressive Personality') and hit scopes (M1 finisher, M2). Exports a single function that resolves applicable boosts for a given weapon type and perk set.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with a single exported function and a private constant array of boost definitions.

nodes.label: getWeaponConditionalBoost
nodes.summary: Iterates over weapon conditional boost definitions, filters by hit scope and weapon type, and computes a combined multiplier from matching perks. Returns the multiplier and list of active perk labels.

nodes.label: crit.ts
nodes.summary: Core critical hit calculation engine. Aggregates multiple natural and extra crit sources (dexterity, elemental boosts, perks like Flowing Crits, Spell Slinger, Sharp Crits, Perfection, etc.), applies Primal divisor logic, and computes effective crit chance and crit damage multiplier with optional proc coefficient scaling.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with internal helper functions and one main exported calculation function. Uses data-driven arrays of CritSource objects.

nodes.label: calcCrit
nodes.summary: Main critical hit calculator. Combines natural crit sources, extra crit sources, and crit damage sources. Applies Primal divisor when active, scales with proc coefficient, and returns a comprehensive CritResult with breakdowns, effective chances, and a human-readable formula string.

nodes.label: calcDexterity
nodes.summary: Computes crit chance bonus from dexterity stat, dividing by DEX_CRIT_DIVISOR.

nodes.label: calcElementalBoost
nodes.summary: Calculates an elemental crit/damage boost by multiplying a stat value by a perk-specific multiplier and stack count.

nodes.label: calcPerfection
nodes.summary: Returns total Perfection crit bonus based on stack count.

nodes.label: hasActiveGatingPerks
nodes.summary: Checks whether any of the given crit sources have an active gating perk in the current perk set.

nodes.label: round
nodes.summary: Rounds a number to two decimal places.

nodes.label: defense.ts
nodes.summary: Defense multiplier calculation module. Resolves percent-based and flat defense sources into damage multipliers, computes true damage reduction percentages, and maps damage types to their applicable defense stat keys via a DEF_GROUP lookup.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting interfaces, functions, and a constant lookup object.

nodes.label: resolveDefenseSources
nodes.summary: Separates defense sources into percent and flat categories, computes individual multipliers and true DR%, then combines them into a final defense multiplier.

nodes.label: calcBaseArmorDefPct
nodes.summary: Looks up applicable defense stat keys for a given damage type and sums their values from the stats map.

nodes.label: calcDefMultiplier
nodes.summary: Converts a defense percentage into a damage multiplier using the formula 1/(1+def) for positive defense, or 1+|def| for negative.

nodes.label: calcTrueDrPercent
nodes.summary: Computes the true damage reduction percentage from a defense percentage value.

nodes.label: DEF_GROUP
nodes.summary: Lookup mapping each damage type (physical, air, earth, fire, water, hex, holy, magic, true, summon) to the defense stat keys that reduce it.

nodes.label: utils.ts
nodes.summary: Shared utility functions used across the damage calculation engine and UI. Includes multiplier rounding, warding debuff calculation, HTML escaping, text highlighting with search match marking, and proc chance computation with different scaling modes.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module with a mix of pure math utilities and UI-facing text processing helpers.

nodes.label: roundMultiplier
nodes.summary: Rounds a multiplier value to four decimal places to avoid floating-point display artifacts.

nodes.label: calcWardingDebuffMultiplier
nodes.summary: Computes the damage multiplier from the Warding debuff: uses 1/(1+wardingPct) for positive warding, or 1-wardingPct for negative.

nodes.label: highlightTextParts
nodes.summary: Splits text into segments marked as highlighted or not based on a search query, for use in UI rendering.

nodes.label: calcProcChance
nodes.summary: Computes the effective proc chance for an effect given a base probability and hit's proc coefficient. Supports 'normal' (scaled), 'positiveOnly' (never nerfed), and 'ignore' scaling modes.

nodes.label: calculateMultiplierFromPct
nodes.summary: Converts a percentage value to a multiplier (e.g., 20 -> 1.2).

nodes.label: multiplyMultipliers
nodes.summary: Multiplies an array of multiplier values together, starting from 1.0.

nodes.label: escapeHtml
nodes.summary: Escapes HTML special characters in a string to prevent injection.

nodes.label: highlightText
nodes.summary: Wraps matching substrings of a search query in HTML <mark> tags for visual highlighting.

nodes.label: CritSource
nodes.summary: Defines a source of critical hit chance or damage, including a label, calculation function, optional gating perks, and whether it qualifies as a 'natural equivalent' for Primal scaling.

nodes.label: CritResult
nodes.summary: Return type for calcCrit containing natural crit chance, effective crit chance with proc scaling, crit damage multiplier, detailed breakdowns of all sources, Primal state, and formula string.

nodes.label: DefenseSource
nodes.summary: Input definition for a defense source with a name, defense percentage, optional flat flag, and optional condition.

nodes.label: DefenseBreakdown
nodes.summary: Result of resolveDefenseSources containing separated percent and flat source lists, individual multipliers, and the final combined multiplier.

nodes.name: enchantTooltip.ts
nodes.summary: Utility module that formats enchantment data into human-readable tooltip strings. Retrieves enchantment data via getEnchant and builds multi-line text including description, stat modifiers (both flat and multiplier), effects, and additional notes.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module exporting a single pure function. Depends on getEnchant from the engine barrel module. Uses string template literals for formatted stat output.

nodes.name: getEnchantTooltipText
nodes.summary: Formats an enchantment's data into a multi-line tooltip string. Displays description, stat modifiers (flat values and multipliers), named effects with values, and optional warning notes. Returns empty string for missing or empty names.

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module that aggregates and publicly exposes the entire damage calculation engine. Re-exports data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, and format sub-modules through a single import path.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript barrel module with six wildcard re-exports. Contains no logic of its own; serves as the single public entry point for the engine subsystem.

nodes.name: store.ts
nodes.summary: Central Svelte store managing the application's BuildState. Provides a writable store with debounced localStorage persistence, a derived result store that runs calcBuild, and exported functions for modifying build configuration: setting/swapping/clearing enchantments, setting guild, moving armor between slots, and swapping ring with infusion. Also defines local type aliases for armor slot keys and mapping constants.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript module using Svelte writable/derived stores with runes-free classic store API. Imports from svelte/store, lib/types, lib/engine, and lib/constants. Contains localStorage read/write with debounced save timer.

nodes.name: loadBuild
nodes.summary: Reads serialized BuildState from localStorage and merges with DEFAULT_BUILD defaults. Returns default state if localStorage is empty, contains invalid JSON, or throws an error.

nodes.name: setEnchantment
nodes.summary: Updates a single enchantment slot at a given index by applying the value and running enforceEnchantSlot validation to ensure slot constraints.

nodes.name: swapEnchantments
nodes.summary: Exchanges the full enchantment arrays between two equipment slots. No-op if both slots are identical.

nodes.name: clearBuild
nodes.summary: Resets the build state to the DEFAULT_BUILD constant, discarding all user configuration.

nodes.name: setGuild
nodes.summary: Sets the guild name and rank on the build state. Handles Draconic guild special cases by forcing race to DRAGON BLOODED, setting a default draconic color, and clearing draconic rune infusion when switching away from Draconic.

nodes.name: moveArmorSlot
nodes.summary: Swaps armor pieces between two slots (main and infusion) after validating both pieces support their target slot types. Also swaps associated upgrade levels. Returns boolean indicating whether the move occurred.

nodes.name: canArmorMoveToSlot
nodes.summary: Predicate that checks whether a named armor piece is compatible with a target slot type by delegating to armorSupportsSlot.

nodes.name: swapRingWithInfusion
nodes.summary: Swaps the ring and infusion ring along with their associated upgrade levels in a single state update.

nodes.name: ArmorSlotKey
nodes.summary: Type alias for the three main armor slot keys: helmet, chestplate, leggings.

nodes.name: InfusionArmorSlotKey
nodes.summary: Type alias for the three infusion armor slot keys: infusionHelmet, infusionChestplate, infusionLeggings.

nodes.name: AnyArmorSlotKey
nodes.summary: Union type combining ArmorSlotKey and InfusionArmorSlotKey, representing all armor slot keys that can be involved in slot movement operations.

nodes.title: static.yml
nodes.description: GitHub Actions workflow that builds the Vite project and deploys the static output to GitHub Pages. Triggers on pushes to main and manual dispatch. Defines two jobs: build (installs Node 24, runs npm install/build, uploads dist artifact) and deploy (uses actions/deploy-pages).
nodes.languageNotes: YAML syntax used for GitHub Actions workflow definition. Standard key-value structure with nested mapping for job steps and configuration.

nodes.title: build job
nodes.description: Build job that checks out code, sets up Node 24, installs dependencies with npm, runs the Vite build, and uploads the dist directory as a Pages artifact.

nodes.title: deploy job
nodes.description: Deploy job that depends on the build job and deploys the uploaded artifact to GitHub Pages using actions/deploy-pages.

nodes.label: .fallowrc.json
nodes.summary: Fallow dead-code analyzer configuration. Defines entry points (src/index.* and src/main.*), sets duplicate detection threshold to 3 occurrences, enables unused-dependencies warning, and lists ignoreExports rules for Svelte components and constants that intentionally export symbols not consumed elsewhere.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON with comments (JSONC) via fallow's schema-aware parser.

nodes.label: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent context file for the voxlblade-builder project. Documents the project as a Voxel Blade damage calculator built with Svelte 5, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, and Vitest. Describes the source layout (lib/engine, lib/data, lib/ui, routes), development workflow commands, file operation guidelines, testing procedures, and security rules for AI agents.

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.summary: Svelte + TypeScript + Vite template readme. Covers recommended IDE setup (VS Code + Svelte extension), explains tradeoffs vs. SvelteKit (routing, framework nature), justifies allowJs/checkJs for mixed JS/TS Svelte codebases, and notes HMR state-preservation limitations.

nodes.label: fallow-output.json
nodes.summary: Fallow dead-code analysis report (schema v7, v2.102.0). Found 28 issues: 1 unused file (svelte.config.js), 23 unused exports across src/data/*.ts, src/lib/defense.ts, src/lib/engine.ts, src/lib/types.ts, src/lib/utils.ts, 2 unused types in SummonData.ts, and 2 duplicate exports (modalSearch, value). All issues have auto-fixable remove-export actions. Identifies 4 entry points (1 default + 3 plugins).

nodes.label: fallow-security.json
nodes.summary: Fallow security analysis report (schema v7, v2.102.0). Reports 25 tainted-sink findings all at low severity: 3 dangerous-html (CWE-79) findings via template.innerHTML in DidYouMean.svelte, SuggestDrop.svelte, and App.svelte (22 occurrences), plus 1 dynamic-regex (CWE-1333) in App.svelte. All are client-side only, reachable from entry but not from untrusted sources. Lists 250 unresolved callee sites due to dynamic dispatch (233) and computed members (17).

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.summary: Vite single-page application entry point. Minimal HTML5 document with viewport meta tag, title 'VoxlBlade Builder', an empty #app mount div, and a module script loading /src/main.ts.

nodes.label: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest for 'voxlblade' (private, ESM). Scripts: dev (vite), build (vite build), preview (vite preview), check (svelte-check + tsc). DevDependencies: Svelte 5.55+, Vite 8.0+, TypeScript 6.0, fallow 2.104+, vite-plugin-pwa, Playwright, ESLint. Runtime dependency: @vercel/analytics.

nodes.label: ts-errors.txt
nodes.summary: Empty TypeScript errors log file. Used to capture or stage TypeScript compilation error output.

nodes.label: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for application source code. Extends @tsconfig/svelte. Targets ES2023 with ESNext modules, enables allowJs/checkJs for mixed JS/TS in .svelte files, includes src/**/*.ts|js|svelte, uses force module detection and noEmit mode.

nodes.label: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript configuration. Simply extends tsconfig.app.json to inherit its compiler options for IDE and editor integration.

nodes.label: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for Node-side code (vite.config.ts only). Targets ES2023, uses bundler module resolution with allowImportingTsExtensions and verbatimModuleSyntax. Enforces strict linting: noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, erasableSyntaxOnly, noFallthroughCasesInSwitch.

nodes.label: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration. Builds with 'npm run build' via Vite framework, outputs to dist/. Defines cache-control headers: immutable (1-year) for /assets/*, must-revalidate for /sw.js and /index.html to support PWA service worker updates.

nodes.title: Armor Set Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 100+ armor set definitions for Voxel Blade. Each armor set includes a name, sharedPart with stats (elemental boosts, defenses, tenacity, protection, warding, resistance) and a perk with amount, plus an array of parts (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings) with descriptions. Armor sets span various themes (elemental, creature-based, class-based) and range from basic to endgame sets.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array of objects with nested structures for stats and parts
nodes.languageLesson: Standard JSON data file - no runtime behavior to analyze

nodes.title: Weapon Blade Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 106 weapon blade definitions across 5 tiers (1-5). Each blade has a name, tier, attackSpeed, stats (damage type distributions, scaling coefficients, stat boosts), optional perks with amounts, and a bladeType (Small Blade, Medium Blade, Heavy Blade, Hammer Head). Blades range from Basic Blade (tier 1) to Starlight Greatblade (tier 5, true damage with all element scaling).
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - blades are weapon components combined with handles to form complete weapons
nodes.languageLesson: Each blade defines attack speed, damage type weights (physicalType, fireType, etc.), and scaling coefficients

nodes.title: Enchantment Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 52 enchantment definitions split into two categories: unAscended (25 enchantments like Legendary, Strengthened, Burning) and Ascended (27 enchantments like Mythical, Flawless, Blazing). Each enchantment defines stacking rules (exclusive/multi), stat modifications (multipliers and additions), special effects, and optional notes about acquisition methods. Enchantments modify weapon/armor stats through multiplicative and additive modifiers.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array with complex stat modification objects containing type (multiplier/addition) and value pairs
nodes.languageLesson: Enchantments use a modifier pattern with type discriminator for applying stat changes

nodes.title: Essence Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 106 essence definitions across 5 tiers. Essences mirror the blade system but as standalone items with essenceType 'Essence' (except Proto Essence). Each essence has name, tier, attackSpeed, stats (scaling coefficients, stat boosts), optional perks, and tier progression from Basic Essence (tier 1) to Starlight Essence (tier 5). Essences provide similar stat profiles to blades but with some differences in specific values.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - essences are weapon components similar to blades but with distinct item type
nodes.languageLesson: Essences and blades share similar stat structures but essences have their own essenceType field

nodes.title: Glove Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 22 glove definitions across 4 tiers. Gloves are off-hand equipment with gloveType (Gloves or Shield). Each glove has name, tier, attackSpeed, stats, perks (often including a Spirit perk for Monk class), and gloveType. The Croakernaut Shield is unique as the only Shield-type glove. Gloves provide elemental damage types, stat boosts, and defensive stats.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - gloves are off-hand items, some provide shield functionality
nodes.languageLesson: Gloves often include Spirit perks tied to the Monk guild's spiritual energy system

nodes.title: Guild Class Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 9 guild (class) definitions: Gladiator, Cursed, Cleric, Scholar, Knight, Thief, Draconic, Monk, and Vampire. Each guild has 3 ranks with progressively better stats and perk amounts. Guilds provide unique stat bonuses and perks that define playstyle - e.g., Knight provides defensive stats and shield perks, Thief offers speed and stealth, Monk grants Spirit Commune for spiritual energy abilities.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array with nested ranks array containing stat progression
nodes.languageLesson: Guilds define the class system with rank-based progression of stats and perks

nodes.title: Weapon Handle Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 103 weapon handle definitions across 5 tiers. Handles are weapon components with handleType (Medium Handle, Long Handle, Pole). Each handle has name, tier, attackSpeed, stats, optional perks, and handleType. Handles combine with blades to form complete weapons. Long Handles are slower with higher stats, Poles offer utility perks like Reinforced Block and Dual Wielding.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - handles determine weapon reach, speed, and available stance changes
nodes.languageLesson: Handle type determines weapon class and available stance-change perks like Dual Wielding

nodes.title: Perk Definitions Database
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 300+ perk definitions, the largest data file in the project. Each perk has a name, detailed description of its mechanics, and tags categorizing its function (Offensive, Defensive, Buff, Debuff, Weapon Art, Rune, Finisher, Summoner, etc.) and source (Armor, Weapon, Ring, Guild, Enchantment). Perks define unique combat mechanics including damage boosts, status effects, stance changes, healing, and special abilities. Tags indicate which equipment slots can grant each perk.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - largest data file, serves as the central reference for all perk mechanics
nodes.languageLesson: Perks use a tag-based classification system for categorization and cross-referencing

nodes.title: Player Race Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 10 player race definitions: Human, Half-Ork, Elf, Dark Elf, Dragon Blooded, Ork, High Elf, Arborian, Kitsune, and Bunikin. Each race has a name, passive ability description, and optional stat/cooldown modifiers. Races provide unique gameplay mechanics - e.g., Dragon Blooded gains resistance and warding, Ork gains tenacity per buff, Bunikin gains jump boost with dodge mechanics.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - smallest game data file, races provide passive bonuses
nodes.languageLesson: Race modifiers use flexible schema - some have statModifiers, others have cooldownModifiers or unique fields

nodes.title: Ring Accessory Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 35 ring definitions. Rings are accessory equipment providing stat bonuses and a single perk each. Each ring has name, description, upgrade level (always 0), stats, perkName, and perkAmount. Rings cover various playstyles - offensive (Fire Ring, Hex Ring), defensive (Parrying Ring, Bastion Ring), utility (Quickstep Ring, Lucky Ring), and class-specific (Blaster Ring for Thief).
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - rings always provide exactly one perk at amount 1 (or 2 for Buni Ring)
nodes.languageLesson: Ring upgrade field is always 0, suggesting upgrade system exists but rings start at base level

nodes.title: Rune Ability Definitions
nodes.summary: JSON data file containing 41 rune definitions. Runes are active abilities with cooldowns. Each rune has name, description, upgrade level (always 0), stats, cooldown (varying from 5 to 120 seconds), and optional perk. Runes provide combat abilities like Fireball Rune (15s CD), Heal Rune (40s CD), various mount runes, and utility abilities. Some runes grant perks that modify other systems (e.g., Bomber Satchel grants Beenades stacks).
nodes.languageNotes: JSON array - runes define active abilities with cooldown-based balance
nodes.languageLesson: Rune cooldowns range from 5s (spam abilities) to 120s (powerful summons), defining ability power budget

nodes.title: UI Upgrade Plan
nodes.summary: Multi-phase refactoring roadmap for the Voxlblade UI. Documents the current monolithic state of App.svelte (~4,456 lines) and DamageAnalyzer.svelte (~5,766 lines), and proposes 8 implementation phases: modal system extraction, toast notifications, header/layout modularization, CSS variable consolidation, responsive improvements, performance optimization, accessibility fixes, and build comparison.
nodes.languageNotes: Markdown with embedded CSS design tokens and multi-level headings.

nodes.title: Analysis Ignore Patterns
nodes.summary: Configuration file defining glob patterns for files and directories to exclude from codebase analysis. Uses .gitignore-compatible syntax with support for comments, negation, and directory indicators. Includes commented-out suggestions for excluding log files, test files, build artifacts, and IDE-specific files across multiple language ecosystems.

nodes.title: Project Scan Results
nodes.summary: Auto-generated scan manifest containing the full project import map (2,449 lines), language distribution, framework detection, file classifications, and complexity estimates for the entire voxlblade codebase. Serves as the data source for batch analysis pipeline orchestration.

nodes.title: Standalone Build Decoder
nodes.summary: Debug utility script that performs a complete build stat decode pipeline offline, independent of the Svelte frontend. Loads game data from JSON files (armors, rings, runes, blades, handles, races, guilds, enchantments, perks), applies upgrade scaling, enchantment modifiers, shrine multipliers, and infusion effects, then outputs accumulated stats and finalized perk values to the console. Mirrors the calculation logic from src/lib/engine/ for debugging and validation purposes.
nodes.languageNotes: ESM JavaScript using readFileSync for JSON data loading; uses Map/Set data structures for efficient lookups.

nodes.title: Developer Onboarding Guide
nodes.summary: Comprehensive onboarding document for new contributors. Describes the project architecture across 9 layers (root config, source root, data, library, constants, engine, modals, statistics, stores), details the damage calculation pipeline, buff/debuff system, engine architecture, and state management. Includes a guided 10-step tour, full file map with purpose descriptions, and a complexity hotspot table identifying the largest/most complex files (DamageAnalyzer.svelte at 6,652 lines, App.svelte at 3,702 lines, perks.json at 3,689 lines).
nodes.languageNotes: Markdown with tables, code paths, and structured section hierarchy.

nodes.title: Global Styles & Design Tokens
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for all visual design tokens and global CSS reset/base styles. Defines a comprehensive design system including: color palette (--bg, --surface, --ink, --accent variants, --weapon-blade, --monk-glove, etc.), spacing scale (4px base), border radius scale, shadow presets, animation durations/easings, semantic font sizes, font weights, line heights, letter spacing, z-index layers, Draconic theme variables (--draco-*), glass-morphism utilities, scrollbar styling, and component-specific utility classes for weapon art boxes, wild bolt boxes, and drag-and-drop targets. Includes a prefers-reduced-motion media query for accessibility.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure CSS with custom properties (CSS variables) organized into themed :root blocks. Uses modern CSS features like color-mix(), backdrop-filter, and container queries.

nodes.title: Root Application Component
nodes.summary: The main orchestrator component for the entire Voxlblade builder application (~3,978 lines). Manages all top-level state including race/guild/armor/weapon selections, enchantment configurations, drag-and-drop armor reordering, modal systems for item selection (race, guild, armor, ring, rune, blade, handle, glove, essence), stat filtering, tag filtering, weapon art selection, draconic abilities (Dragon Claw/Infusion/Bubble), undo/clear functionality, build save integration, and CDR calculations. Contains extensive reactive declarations ($:) for derived computation including effective stat rows, perk rows, armor sort helpers, modal search with Levenshtein distance suggestions, and enchantment slot management. Orchestrates child components: AppHeader, Toast, DamageAnalyzer, BuffList, BuildSaves, CdrStepsCalc, TagFilter, StatFilter, WeaponStatFilter, LevelBar, EmotionalTracker, DraconicAbilityStats, and multiple modal components (RaceModal, GuildModal, AccessorySelectModal, WeaponPartModal).
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 (using $: reactive statements, not yet runes). Heavy use of Svelte stores ($build, $result) and event dispatching. Template contains conditional rendering blocks, each loops, and slot-based composition.

nodes.title: Base Damage Calculator
nodes.summary: Complex damage calculation and display component (~2,566 lines) that computes per-hit damage breakdowns for the weapon's attack pattern. Accepts weapon hits, typed boost entries, debuffs, crit info, armor penetration, and numerous specialty parameters (dragon state, dark magic hex, echoing incineration, bombardier, cauterize, etc.) as props. Implements the full damage mitigation pipeline: resolves damage types via perk bonuses, applies typed boost multipliers, calculates effective enemy defenses (with debuff reductions), computes armor penetration (dual-branch formula with low/high thresholds), applies debuff damage multipliers, and produces detailed ComputedHit objects with tooltip formulas. Also handles DoT tick calculations (bleed/burn/poison) with melting shred, wound true damage, life drinker healing, and siphoning rot. Features daily challenge presets, defense input controls, and variant cycling for debuff sources.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte component using $: reactivity for reactive damage computations. Complex nested reactive blocks. Uses Svelte transition animations (fade, fly).

nodes.title: Buff & Debuff Display
nodes.summary: Tabbed buff/debuff/neutral display component (~759 lines) that aggregates all active buffs from equipment, perks, weapon arts, draconic infusion, auto-debuffs, and True Balance. Groups identical buffs by name, selects the strongest source, and computes effective potency after applying perk modifiers (warding debuff multiplier, Minion Absorption summon boost, Endless Despair DoT potency, draconic hex/holy potency multipliers). Renders each buff group with color-coded source badges (rune/perk/weaponArt/race/cantrip), potency values, duration, description text, and conditional highlighting for the strongest contributor. Includes Melting Slime sticky buff consolidation and Toxin Transfer duration adjustments.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte component with $: reactive statements. Uses CSS class toggling and transition:fade for animations. Complex reactive chains for buff aggregation.

nodes.title: Build Save/Load Manager
nodes.summary: Build persistence and sharing component (~596 lines) providing save slots with localStorage backing, build encoding/decoding via compression (CompressionStream/DecompressionStream with deflate-raw), shareable base64url codes, import/export functionality, slot renaming, and two-click confirmation for load/delete operations. Implements a slim state serialization format with key mapping (SAVE_KEY_MAP), enchantment compression (ENCH_MAP), and input sanitization (prototype pollution prevention via DANGEROUS_KEYS check, type validation via sanitizeField). Supports both modern compressed format and legacy base64 fallback for backwards-compatible import.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte component using onMount/onDestroy lifecycle, fly/fade transitions, and $: reactive statements. Uses Web Streams API (CompressionStream/DecompressionStream) for build encoding.

nodes.title: Cooldown Reduction Step Display
nodes.summary: Small display component (~93 lines) that renders a step-by-step cooldown reduction calculation chain. Shows each CDR step as a before â†’ operator â†’ multiplier = after row, with a set-bonus override display (base â†’ set CD) and a final floor step with minimum cooldown capping (CD_MINIMUM = 1s). Styled with monospace numbers, strikethrough for old values, and green accent for final values.
nodes.languageNotes: Minimal Svelte component with scoped <style> block. Uses Svelte {@const} template syntax for computed values within each loops.

nodes.name: CritIcon.svelte
nodes.summary: Inline SVG critical-hit icon component that renders a stylized star shape with a red-to-orange gradient. Accepts a configurable size prop.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 export-let props with a unique gradient ID generated from Math.random.

nodes.name: DamageAnalyzer.svelte
nodes.summary: Central damage calculation and analysis component (~6700 lines). Orchestrates weapon stat computation, buff/debuff aggregation, defensive perk resolution, elemental type bonuses, DoT calculations, self-damage calculations, and heal boosting. Imports and wires together nearly every data module and engine utility in the project.
nodes.languageNotes: Massive Svelte 4 component using $: reactive declarations extensively. Acts as the primary 'glue' layer between data modules and the UI.

nodes.name: draconicRunes.ts
nodes.summary: Calculates Draconic Runes and Dragon Infusion damage bonuses. Provides apply/get helper pairs that add color-based bonuses to damage type maps, and combines both into a unified draconic bonus.
nodes.languageNotes: Exports two interfaces (DraconicRunesContext, DragonInfusionContext) and four public functions. Internal helper functions are kept private.

nodes.name: applyDraconicRunesBonus
nodes.summary: Adds Draconic Runes stack-based bonus (5% per stack) to the matching damage type in the damage map.

nodes.name: getDraconicRunesBonus
nodes.summary: Returns a standalone bonus map for Draconic Runes without mutating the input.

nodes.name: applyDragonInfusionBonus
nodes.summary: Applies Dragon Infusion buff potency to the matching damage type if the infusion is active.

nodes.name: getDragonInfusionBonus
nodes.summary: Returns a standalone bonus map for Dragon Infusion without mutating the input.

nodes.name: applyDraconicBonuses
nodes.summary: Composes Draconic Runes and Dragon Infusion bonuses into a single damage map transformation. Public API entry point.

nodes.name: getDraconicBonuses
nodes.summary: Returns a combined standalone bonus map from both Draconic Runes and Dragon Infusion. Public API entry point.

nodes.name: selfDamagePerks.ts
nodes.summary: Defines self-damage perk definitions (Undead Might, Explosive Charge, Dark Magic, Bombardier) and calculates the actual self-damage dealt considering DR stacking, multi-target falloff via harmonic series, and per-type defense multipliers.
nodes.languageNotes: Exports constants, interface, data array, and a calculator function.

nodes.name: calcSelfDamage
nodes.summary: Computes self-damage from a perk definition considering base multiplier, DR-per-stack scaling, harmonic-series multi-target falloff, and per-element defense multipliers.

nodes.name: stanceOverlays.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves which weapon stance overlay (Rifle, Shotgun, Dual Guns, Side Gun, Cosmic Ray, Mine) is active based on context like equipped perks, blaster count, and whether the player uses fists or a weapon.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a table-driven pattern: an array of condition+resolve pairs evaluated in priority order.

nodes.name: resolveStanceOverlay
nodes.summary: Iterates stance overlay definitions and returns the first matching overlay result, or null if none match.

nodes.name: DidYouMean.svelte
nodes.summary: Fuzzy search suggestion component that displays 'Did you mean?' chips when no exact search results are found. Supports both name and perk-type suggestions with text highlighting and a dispatch-on-select pattern.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 createEventDispatcher and imports highlightTextParts from lib/utils.

nodes.name: DmgTotalTooltip.svelte
nodes.summary: Damage breakdown tooltip component that groups damage types, renders an animated SVG pie chart showing proportion, and lists individual entries with badge tags. Uses Svelte 5 runes ($props, $derived, $state).
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 5 runes syntax ($props, $derived, $state) and imports ComputedHit/BADGE_CONFIG from lib/dmgTypes and Badge component.

nodes.name: DraconicAbilityStats.svelte
nodes.summary: Displays draconic ability stat rows (damage type, scaling, poise damage) with optional holy/water heal values. Simple presentation component.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 export-let props with conditional rendering for heal rows.

nodes.name: EmotionalTracker.svelte
nodes.summary: Three-state emotional buff/debuff tracker with button shortcuts and a custom range slider. Persists selection to the build store. Supports 'Only Buffs', 'Only Debuffs', and 'Both Buff & Debuff' modes with distinct color theming.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 $: reactive statements and imports the build store from lib/store.

nodes.name: Highlight.svelte
nodes.summary: Simple text highlighting utility component. Splits text by search query matches and wraps matched portions in <mark> tags with a custom highlight class.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 $: reactive and imports highlightTextParts from lib/utils.

nodes.name: LevelBar.svelte
nodes.summary: Interactive level and HP bar component with drag-to-set-fill, inline level editing, shield overlay (blue), lost HP zone (red), threshold line, and notch markers. Computes effective max HP from protection stat and persists both level and HP fill to localStorage.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 $: reactivity, global window events for drag, and localStorage for state persistence.

nodes.name: AppHeader.svelte
nodes.summary: Application header with gradient background, 'VoxlBuilder' branding, and animated tab switcher (Overview/Analyze) using a sliding bubble indicator. Renders BuildSaves component.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 createEventDispatcher, onMount lifecycle, and animated bubble positioning via getBoundingClientRect.

nodes.name: boosts.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 46 numeric constants for damage boost calculations across the game's perk system, including per-stack multipliers (Frenzy, Blood Thirsty, Venom Spitter, etc.) and complex boost internals (Guardian Spin, Wild Bolt, Spirit Winds, etc.).
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constant exports with no logic. Organized into simple multiplier-per-stack boosts and complex boost calcFn internals.

nodes.name: cdr.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 13 cooldown reduction (CDR) constants for various perks and equipment sets, including caster rune/WA percentages, channeled weapon CDR, and set bonus cooldowns.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constant exports for CDR mechanics.

nodes.name: defensive.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 18 defensive perk damage reduction (DR) constants covering Barbskin, Stoneskin, Adaptive Plate, Protector Spirit, Air Pressure, Valor Shield, Vampire, Frenzy, Stored Corruption, Mounted Defense, Carapace, and Cursed Bark.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constant exports for defensive mechanics. Some values are fractional (e.g., VAMPIRE_DR_PER_STACK = 10/3).

nodes.name: draconic-colors.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 12 draconic color effect multiplier constants for Fire, Air, Earth, Water, and Hex elements, covering speed, damage, knockback, cooldown, and stun modifiers.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constant exports for draconic element color effects.

nodes.name: draconic.ts
