nodes.summary: Exports 7 draconic system constants: infusion potency/duration multipliers, dragon state HP and base values, and Bastion Bless multiplier.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constant exports for draconic infusion and dragon state mechanics.

nodes.name: heals.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 4 healing-related constants: crit healing base value and per-stack scaling, holy boost divisor, and Ocean Song per-stack multiplier.
nodes.languageNotes: Minimal pure constant exports for healing mechanics.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module for the constants directory. Re-exports 16 sub-modules: damage-types, game, storage, thresholds, perks, boosts, heals, draconic, perk-base-damage, rune-base-damage, buffs, stat-conversions, defensive, dot-damage, draconic-colors, cdr, and debuff-effects.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure re-export barrel file with no logic.

nodes.name: perk-base-damage.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 76 numeric constants defining base damage, damage-per-stack scaling, heal values, poise damage, and HP gate thresholds for ~25 perks including Dragon Claw, Dragon Bubble, Springblast, spirits, Barbed Flurry, Melting Slime, Apollo Boost, and more.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constant exports organized by perk name with comment headers. Largest constants file in the batch.

nodes.name: thresholds.ts
nodes.summary: Exports 3 game threshold constants: armor penetration branch threshold (0.2), minimum cooldown (1s), and base critical damage percentage (100%).
nodes.languageNotes: Minimal pure constant exports.

nodes.name: EnchantSelect.svelte
nodes.summary: Enchantment dropdown selector component with searchable list, color-coded dots per enchantment rarity/type, keyboard navigation (arrow keys, enter, escape), portal-based positioning, and scroll/resize-aware dropdown placement. Contains a color map of ~50 enchantments.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 export-let/createEventDispatcher, slide transition, onMount/onDestroy lifecycle, and global event listeners for outside-click detection.

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module for the damage calculation engine. Re-exports 6 sub-modules: data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, and format.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure re-export barrel file with no logic.

nodes.name: Modal.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable modal dialog component with backdrop blur, fly-in animation, focus trapping, and close-on-escape/click-outside. Exports extensive global CSS classes for modal item lists, stat pills, perk tags, rank buttons, and filter selects used throughout the application.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 module context for focusOnOpen action. Heavy use of :global() CSS selectors for shared modal styling.

nodes.name: AccessorySelectModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting armor pieces (helmet/chestplate/leggings), rings, runes, or infusions. Displays item stats, perks, descriptions, and computes effective boost values based on weapon scalings (including Brawny conversion). Integrates search, suggestions, DidYouMean, and Highlight components.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 4 export-let props, imports from engine (getArmorPart, formatStat, formatLabel), store (build), and multiple UI sub-components.

nodes.title: GuildModal
nodes.summary: Modal dialog for selecting a guild in the build calculator. Displays searchable guild list with rank selection buttons, stat pills for each rank, and perk tags. Uses shared ModalSearchHeader for search/suggestions/tag filtering.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component using export let props and $: reactive statements for filtering guilds by search query and tag selection.
nodes.languageLesson: Svelte 4 reactive declarations ($:) derive filtered guilds from search and tag inputs. Uses export let for props and on:click for event handling.

nodes.title: Modals barrel export
nodes.summary: Barrel module re-exporting all modal components: RaceModal, GuildModal, AccessorySelectModal, and WeaponPartModal.
nodes.languageNotes: Named re-exports from default imports of sibling Svelte components.

nodes.title: RaceModal
nodes.summary: Modal dialog for selecting a character race. Shows searchable race list with passive descriptions and stat modifier pills. Hides tag and stat filters via ModalSearchHeader.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component with $: reactive filtering and build store mutation on selection.
nodes.languageLesson: Uses build.update() to mutate the Svelte store when a race is selected, then closes the modal.

nodes.title: WeaponPartModal
nodes.summary: Modal dialog for selecting weapon parts (blade, handle, glove, or essence). Features tier/type filter dropdowns, weapon stat filtering via WeaponStatFilter, Badge display for tier/type, and weapon stats preview. Dynamically adapts title, store key, and display based on modalType prop.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component with derived reactive statements for dynamic titles and store keys based on modalType.
nodes.languageLesson: Uses $: derived values to compute storeKey, title, and selectedValue from the modalType prop, allowing a single component to serve four different selection flows.

nodes.title: StatFilterShared (StatChip + buildStatMaps)
nodes.summary: Dual-purpose module exporting a reusable StatChip button component and a buildStatMaps() utility function. StatChip is a tri-state toggle chip (off/include/exclude) used in StatFilter and WeaponStatFilter. buildStatMaps creates label and color lookup maps from stat group definitions.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte's script context='module' to export the buildStatMaps utility alongside the component instance script. Tri-state CSS classes: chip--include (green), chip--exclude (red), chip--dimmed.
nodes.languageLesson: Svelte module-context scripts (<script context='module'>) export module-level utilities that can be imported by consumers alongside the default component export.

nodes.title: Elemental boost stat definitions
nodes.summary: Defines ELEMENTAL_BOOST_STATS array (10 element types: dexterity through summon) and derives NEGATIVE_ELEMENTAL_BOOST_STATS with neg: prefixed keys. Used by StatFilter and WeaponStatFilter.
nodes.languageNotes: Exports typed StatDef arrays. NEGATIVE_ELEMENTAL_BOOST_STATS is derived via .map() with key prefix transformation.
nodes.languageLesson: Simple data module pattern: export typed constants for game stat definitions consumed by multiple filter components.

nodes.title: Filter actions factory
nodes.summary: Factory function createFilterActions() that produces toggle/remove/clear/handleChipKeyDown handlers for tri-state filter chips. Manages a Map<string, FilterState> with include/exclude/delete cycle. Used by both StatFilter and WeaponStatFilter.
nodes.languageNotes: Exports FilterState and FilterMap types. Returns a closures-based API with getActive/setActive/notify injected by caller.
nodes.languageLesson: Factory pattern with closure injection: the caller provides state access and notification callbacks, keeping the filter logic decoupled from any specific state management approach.

nodes.title: Toast notification container
nodes.summary: Fixed-position toast notification container that renders active toasts from the toast store. Supports success/error/info/warning types with distinct colors and icons. Uses Svelte fly transition for slide-in animation.
nodes.languageNotes: Imports toasts store from ./stores/toast. Uses Svelte transition fly for entrance animation. Maps toast types to CSS styles and unicode icons.
nodes.languageLesson: Toast pattern: a fixed container reads from a writable store, renders items with transitions, and provides dismiss buttons.

nodes.title: Badge UI component
nodes.summary: Reusable inline badge component with 9 color variants (default/green/amber/red/purple/blue/teal/muted/draco), 3 sizes (xs/sm/md), optional square shape, solid mode, and monospace font. Supports dynamic color via CSS custom property override.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 $props() with Snippet type for children. Uses CSS custom properties for theming. Dynamic color applied via inline style overrides.
nodes.languageLesson: Svelte 5 component pattern: uses $props() rune for typed destructured props and Snippet type for slot-like content projection.

nodes.title: Button UI component
nodes.summary: Reusable button component with 6 variants (default/positive/negative/warning/info/neutral), 3 sizes (sm/md/lg), active state toggle, and disabled support. Uses Svelte 5 props and Snippet.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 $props() with Snippet children. CSS uses design token variables for padding, border-radius, and font sizes.
nodes.languageLesson: Consistent UI component pattern: variant-based class toggling with CSS custom property tokens from the design system.

nodes.title: Card UI component
nodes.summary: Card container component with 3 variants (default/surface/ghost), 7 accent colors, 4 padding sizes, 4 gap sizes, optional hover state with shadow, and keyboard-accessible click support via role=button.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 $props(). Implements keyboard accessibility (Enter/Space) for clickable cards via onkeydown handler.
nodes.languageLesson: Accessible interactive containers: when onclick is provided, the div gets role='button' and tabindex with keyboard event handlers.

nodes.title: Divider UI component
nodes.summary: Horizontal rule divider with 8 color variants and 4 spacing options. Minimal component wrapping an hr element with CSS class toggling.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 $props() with simple variant-based class assignment.
nodes.languageLesson: Simplest UI component pattern: a single HTML element with variant-driven class names.

nodes.title: UI barrel export
nodes.summary: Barrel module re-exporting all UI components: Card, Badge, Button, Stat, Section, Divider, and Panel.
nodes.languageNotes: Named re-exports from default imports of sibling Svelte components.
nodes.languageLesson: Barrel pattern provides a single import path for the entire UI component library.

nodes.title: Panel UI component
nodes.summary: Panel container with gradient background, optional header slot, 7 color variants, and 4 padding sizes. Has a distinct visual style with rounded-xl corners and subtle gradient transitions.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 $props() with two Snippet slots: header and children. Gradient backgrounds use color-mixed transparent overlays.
nodes.languageLesson: Multiple Snippet slots: header and children slots allow flexible content layout within a styled container.

nodes.title: Section UI component
nodes.summary: Section container with title or custom header, 8 color variants, 3 gap sizes. Features uppercase label header with bottom border. Supports both string title and custom header Snippet.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 $props(). Header can be either a string title (rendered as span) or a custom Snippet for more complex headers.
nodes.languageLesson: Conditional Snippet rendering: {#if header}{@render header()}{:else} pattern allows flexible content projection.

nodes.title: Stat display component
nodes.summary: Key-value stat display row with label on left and value on right. Supports 6 color variants for value tinting, 3 sizes, optional hover state, and children Snippet for custom value content.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 $props(). Value color is controlled by variant class targeting .ui-stat__value. Falls back to value prop if no children Snippet.
nodes.languageLesson: Flex-based key-value layout with conditional content: children snippet takes priority over the value prop.

nodes.title: UI constants
nodes.summary: Central constants module exporting UI_COLORS (damage type, tag group, source type, and enchant rarity color hex values), SOURCE_LABELS (display labels for source types), and internal STAT_LABELS/TAG_LABELS mappings.
nodes.languageNotes: Exports two public const objects (UI_COLORS, SOURCE_LABELS) and two private const objects (STAT_LABELS, TAG_LABELS). Uses 'as const' for readonly type inference.
nodes.languageLesson: Design token pattern: centralized color and label constants shared across all UI components and filter panels.

nodes.title: Application entry point
nodes.summary: Application entry point that mounts the root App component to the DOM #app element, imports global styles, and initializes Vercel analytics.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte 5 mount() API (replaces Svelte 4 new App() constructor). Imports @vercel/analytics for page view tracking.
nodes.languageLesson: Svelte 5 app bootstrap: mount(App, { target }) replaces the Svelte 4 constructor-based mounting.

nodes.title: ModalSearchHeader
nodes.summary: Composite search header component used across all modal dialogs. Combines a text search input with SuggestDrop autocomplete, optional TagFilter, optional StatFilter/WeaponStatFilter, and optional sort buttons (Highest/Most Effective/Brawny). Acts as a coordination layer between search, tag, and stat filter subsystems.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component with many exported props controlling which sub-panels are visible. Re-dispatches events from child components (SuggestDrop, TagFilter, StatFilter, WeaponStatFilter).
nodes.languageLesson: Composite component pattern: a single header component composes multiple child filter components and relays their events to the parent modal.

nodes.title: MountIcon
nodes.summary: Inline SVG icon component rendering a mount/mountain icon with a blue-to-cyan gradient fill. Accepts a configurable size prop.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component with export let size prop. Uses Math.random() to generate unique gradient IDs preventing SVG ID conflicts.
nodes.languageLesson: Unique SVG gradient IDs: generating random IDs per instance avoids collisions when multiple icons render on the same page.

nodes.title: ScalingBreakdownRow
nodes.summary: Grid-layout row component for displaying a single weapon scaling breakdown line. Shows damage type dot + label, scaling value, boost percentage, and calculated contribution. Handles negative boost coloring and optional zero-boost display.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component. Uses $: reactive for PERCENT_STATS check. Grid layout with fixed column widths. Imports roundMultiplier utility and PERCENT_STATS constant.
nodes.languageLesson: CSS Grid for tabular data: fixed column widths in grid-template-columns ensure consistent alignment across rows.

nodes.title: StatFilter
nodes.summary: Expandable stat filter panel for armor/accessory stat filtering. Features positive/negative stat tabs, tri-state chip toggles (off/include/exclude), sort mode selection (highest/lowest/alphabetical), and active filter summary row. Defines defense, utility, and boost stat groups with colors from uiConstants.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component. Uses createFilterActions factory for state management. buildStatMaps from StatFilterShared for label/color lookups. Dispatches 'change' events with filter Map and sortMode.
nodes.languageLesson: Expandable filter pattern: a collapsible header with active count badge, summary chips for active filters, and a slide-transition panel for the full filter grid.

nodes.title: SuggestDrop
nodes.summary: Autocomplete suggestion dropdown for search inputs. Renders a positioned dropdown list of suggestions with type badges (Name/Perk) and highlighted matching text segments. Uses mousedown|preventDefault to avoid stealing focus from the search input.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component. Uses highlightTextParts utility for query-aware text highlighting with <mark> elements. Position: absolute dropdown below search input.
nodes.languageLesson: Focus-preserving dropdown: mousedown|preventDefault on items prevents the input blur event from firing before the selection handler runs.

nodes.title: TagFilter
nodes.summary: Expandable tag filter panel for filtering by perk tags. Organizes tags into 5 groups (Combat, Support, Status, Weapon Art/Rune, Special) with color-coded chips. Features collapsible panel, summary chips in the header bar, clear-all button, and hideTags prop to exclude specific tags.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component. TAG_GROUPS and TAG_COLOR_MAP defined locally. Dispatches 'toggle' events for individual tags and 'change' for bulk updates. Uses slide transition.
nodes.languageLesson: Tag filter UX: collapsed state shows active tags as summary chips in the header; expanded state reveals the full tag grid organized by category.

nodes.title: WeaponStatFilter
nodes.summary: Weapon-specific stat filter panel with three stat groups: Damage Type (10 types), Scaling (10 scaling stats), and Boost/Stats (elemental boosts + utility stats). Exports matchesFilter() function for programmatic item filtering. Uses tri-state chip toggles with prefix labels (DMG/SCL/STAT).
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 component. Exports both a reactive filterValue prop and a matchesFilter() method for imperative filtering. Uses buildStatMaps and createFilterActions from shared modules.
nodes.languageLesson: Hybrid reactive/imperative API: the component both dispatches change events (reactive) and exports a matchesFilter function (imperative) for consumers that need synchronous filtering.

nodes.label: WeaponStatsDisplay.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component that renders weapon stat pills inside a modal. Accepts a `stats` record prop and splits entries into three categoriesâ€”damage types (keys ending in 'Type'), scalings (keys ending in 'Scaling'), and boosts (everything else)â€”via `splitWeaponStats`. Each category renders in a labeled group with color-coded pills: orange for damage types, purple for scalings, and green for boosts. Negative boost values are highlighted in red. Helper functions `prettyKey`, `formatLabel`, and `formatStat` handle display formatting, adding '%' suffixes for percentage-based stats like Boost, Defense, and warding.

nodes.label: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration for the voxlblade-builder project. Sets the base path from the VITE_BASE_PATH environment variable (defaulting to '/voxlblade-builder/'). Configures two plugins: the Svelte plugin for compiling .svelte files, and VitePWA for progressive web app support with autoUpdate registration, a standalone display manifest (app name 'voxlblade builder'), and a Workbox service worker that caches JS/CSS/HTML/assets and uses StaleWhileRevalidate for navigation requests. Rollup output is configured with manualChunks explicitly disabled.

value.title: Project Overview
value.description: Start here to understand what voxlblade-builder is: a Svelte 5 + Vite + TypeScript damage calculator for the Roblox game Voxel Blade. Examine the README and package.json to learn the tech stack (Svelte 5 runes, Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest, pnpm) and the project's purpose.

value.title: Entry Point & Application Shell
value.description: See how the app boots: main.ts mounts the Svelte 5 app and initializes Vercel Analytics, while App.svelte is the monolithic root component (~3,978 lines) that manages all top-level state, modals, and child orchestration. This is the top of the dependency tree.

value.title: Foundation Types
value.description: Explore the shared type vocabulary that every other layer depends on. types.ts defines 20+ interfaces (StatMap, BuildState, Race, Guild, Armor, WeaponBlade, ProcCoefficient) and utility functions (applyUpgrade, canProc). dmgTypes.ts adds the damage computation result model (ComputedType, ComputedHit, BADGE_CONFIG).

value.title: Game Data Layer
value.description: Dive into the game's static data: JSON files for 11 entity datasets (armors, blades, handles, rings, runes, enchantments, races, guilds, perks) and TypeScript modules for mechanics definitions (weaponArts, Boost, BuffData, procCoefficients, weapon base damage). The engine/data/ sub-modules provide accessor functions that build lookup maps from JSON.

value.title: Game Constants & Tuning Parameters
value.description: Examine the pure-constant modules that parameterize every game mechanic: crit formulas, buff potency values, cooldown reduction, damage types, HP formulas, and storage keys. These are a centralized spreadsheet of game balance values with zero logic.

value.title: Calculation Engine
value.description: The core brain: build.ts orchestrates a pipeline (accumulateEquipment -> finalizePerks -> deriveResults) that transforms a BuildState into a complete BuildResult. Sub-modules handle weapon resolution, enchantment application, shrine bonuses, elemental damage bonuses, crit computation, and defense reduction.

value.title: State Management & Persistence
value.description: Learn how the Svelte store bridges the engine and UI. store.ts creates a writable store with debounced localStorage persistence and a derived store that runs calcBuild on every state change. Exports convenience functions (setEnchantment, swapEnchantments, clearBuild, moveArmorSlot) that encapsulate state mutation logic.

value.title: UI Design System (Primitives)
value.description: Explore the reusable UI building blocks: Badge, Button, Card, Divider, Panel, Section, and Stat components using Svelte 5 $props() runes. app.css defines the complete design token system (colors, spacing, radii, shadows, animations, Draconic theme variables). These have zero knowledge of game mechanics.

value.title: Feature UI Components
value.description: Domain-specific components that compose UI primitives with application logic: modal dialogs (RaceModal, GuildModal, WeaponPartModal, AccessorySelectModal), search/filter systems (StatFilter, WeaponStatFilter, TagFilter), and display components (WeaponStatsDisplay, CritIcon, DmgTotalTooltip). These bridge the design system and the application layer.

value.title: Damage Analysis Views
value.description: The largest components in the codebase: DamageAnalyzer.svelte (~6,700 lines) is the main analysis view with complex reactive computation chains, BaseDamageCalc.svelte (~2,566 lines) handles per-hit damage breakdowns, and CdrStepsCalc.svelte shows cooldown reduction details. These are the primary refactoring targets.

project.name: voxlblade
project.description: A Svelte 5 + Vite + TypeScript damage calculator for Voxel Blade RPG with weapon calculations, enchantments, perks, and draconic rune system
